query:
INSERT INTO workspace_timeline (workspace_id, event, event_type, created_at) VALUES
(1, '01/11/2025 — DEVICE_CREATED event from IP 97.120.218.56/58. First visible account event on record.', 'case_event', '2025-01-11 00:00:00'),
(1, '01/20/2025 — DEBIT_CARD_FUNDING ($10) from IP 83.143.248.114 (New York, NY). Normal activity.', 'case_event', '2025-01-20 00:00:00'),
(1, '01/23/2025 — DEBIT_CARD_FUNDING ($100) from IP 82.118.177.250 (New York, NY). Normal activity.', 'case_event', '2025-01-23 00:00:00'),
(1, '02/11/2025 — CRYPTO_ORDER/TRANSFER from IP 130.195.219.196 (New York, NY). Normal activity.', 'case_event', '2025-02-11 00:00:00'),
(1, '02/12/2025 — CRYPTO_TRANSFER from IP 130.195.213.134 (New York, NY). Normal activity.', 'case_event', '2025-02-12 00:00:00'),
(1, '09/09/2025 — LIQUIDATION PHASE (6:49–6:51 AM): Three equity sell orders (one cancelled) from IP 89.116.218.6 with generic "United States" location tag. ANOMALOUS — IP never seen before or after.', 'critical_event', '2025-09-09 06:49:00'),
(1, '09/09/2025 — THEFT PHASE (9:32–9:33 AM): USDC purchase and withdrawal of $1,289 from IP 23.249.172.42 (New York, NY). Total loss: $1,289.', 'critical_event', '2025-09-09 09:32:00'),
(1, '04/28/2026 — Claimant filed Original Disputed Discovery Request with Robinhood requesting technical records: IPs, MFA logs, device logs (Exhibit 1).', 'legal_action', '2026-04-28 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/07/2026 — Robinhood counsel Simeon Schopf objects to discovery requests as "interrogatories" under FINRA Rule 12507(a)(1) and refuses to provide further data (Exhibit 2).', 'legal_action', '2026-07-07 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/13/2026 — Meet and confer deadline passed without resolution.', 'deadline', '2026-07-13 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/15/2026 — Forensic analysis completed: IP 89.116.218.6 and "United States" location tag appear ONLY on Sept 9, directly contradicting Robinhood consistency claim. Deliverables A, B, C finalized.', 'milestone', '2026-07-15 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/15/2026 — Robinhood rejects $5,500 counteroffer. Increases settlement offer to $800. Maintains device token hash as primary defense.', 'legal_action', '2026-07-15 00:00:00'),
(1, '07/15/2026 — Evidence bundle organized: Exhibits 1, 2, 3 prepared and PDFs converted for FINRA portal submission.', 'milestone', '2026-07-15 00:00:00');
